title: trigonotis harrysmithii
intro: Trigonotis harrysmithii, also known as the Harry Smith's trigonotis, is a plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Trigonotis harrysmithii is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be taken orally or applied topically to the skin.
